series_metadata.series_description: These inspection reports show to see if the firm is following correct GMP regulations and to inform the firm of what areas the inspection covered. A detailed receipt will be left with the firm indicating feed samples collected by the Plant Health Inspectors. This notice also includes observations and/or violations noted by the inspector. Reports or forms that may accompany include, Notice of Feed Inspection and Receipt of Feed Inspection.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep for 3 years then dispose of as wastepaper., Paper: Wastepaper
